subject: Re: Fw: February
body:
just ask her if she's sure she wants to use this as
her vacation so early in the year,, as she is really
entitled,,, but ... she should also tell you if she
plans to stay the whole week... remember unfortunately
no waves......

--- Gmax <gmax1@mindspring.com> wrote:

> You decide but I feel the ans has to be NO..she has
> just had 3 weeks off and the thought of her taking
> what would probably end up another week smacks of an
> entitlement that is pushing too far - a flat, a huge
> pay, and how much holiday?? No doubt later on there
> will be more requests..
> -----Original Message-----
> From: "Jen Doyle" <jdoyle@nysgmail.com>
> Date: Thu, 12 Jan 2006 18:18:08 
> To:"G Maxwell" <gmax1@mindspring.com>
> Subject: February
> 
> Hi Ghislaine,
>  
>  
>  
> I realize it is very soon to ask for more time off
> but I have been invited to a couple of Grammy
> parties in LA and this is a very unique opportunity,
> for me.  As such, I was wondering if I may please
> take February 6-9 as vacation.    
>  
>  
>  
> Thanks,
>  
> Jen   
>  
>  
>  
> 
> G
>

just ask her if she's sure she wants to use this as
her vacation so early in the year,, as she is really
entitled,,, but ... she should also tell you if she
plans to stay the whole week... remember unfortunately
no waves......

--- Gmax gmax1@mindspring.com wrote:

You decide but I feel the ans has to be NO..she has
just had 3 weeks off and the thought of her taking
what would probably end up another week smacks of an
entitlement that is pushing too far - a flat, a huge
pay, and how much holiday?? No doubt later on there
will be more requests..
-----Original Message-----
From: "Jen Doyle" jdoyle@nysgmail.com
Date: Thu, 12 Jan 2006 18:18:08
To:"G Maxwell" gmax1@mindspring.com
Subject: February

Hi Ghislaine,

I realize it is very soon to ask for more time off
but I have been invited to a couple of Grammy
parties in LA and this is a very unique opportunity,
for me. As such, I was wondering if I may please
take February 6-9 as vacation.

Thanks,

Jen

G
